text.title: Consumer Contract Tests Generated from OpenAPI / Traffic Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the test-consumer-contract-from-spec methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: pick-source
step.action: Choose canonical source: OpenAPI > gRPC proto > recorded HTTP traffic > typed client.

step.name: pin-version
step.action: Record commit SHA / file hash of the chosen source.

step.name: run-generator
step.action: Invoke generator (MCP server or skill) to produce Pact JSON + client test.

step.name: commit-readonly
step.action: Commit Pact + client test in one PR; flag generator paths as read-only via pre-commit.

step.name: wire-canigo
step.action: Mark `can-i-deploy` as a required check on the provider repo.
step.output: Provider CI gates merge on contract compat.
step.decision-gate: If broker is down, BLOCK provider merges; do not bypass.
